sglang.title: Update amd nightly concurrency.
sglang.author: saienduri
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This commit fixes the concurrency setting for this workflow. Otherwise, the nvidia nightly and amd nightly are part of the same concurrency group and amd one gets cancelled every night.
Modifications

Checklist

sglang.title: sampling_params: add thinking_budget
sglang.author: thyecust
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

The deep thinking model sometimes outputs a lengthy reasoning process, which takes a long time to generate the response content and consumes more tokens. To solve this problem, you can set the
thinking_budget parameter to constrain the maximum length of the reasoning process.
The thinkin

sglang.title: [Bugfix] Fix Llama4 gibberish output with long context and CUDA graph
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Llama4 is generating gibberish output with long context (larger than 8192) with cuda graph. This PR fixes the issue.
This is because the local attention mechanism wasn't properly handling tensor operations during CUDA graph replay. Specifically:

In init_cuda_graph_state, the relevant ten

sglang.bodyExcerpt:

When turning on hierarchical cache, the memory usage of GPU0 device was significantly higher than that of other devices.

sglang.title: KV‑Cache (MHA, MLA): add missing start_layer / end_layer fields to MHATokenToKVPoolHost and MLATokenToKVPoolHost
sglang.author: Simon-Li
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix #6005
Modifications
both MHATokenToKVPoolHost.init and MLATokenToKVPoolHost.init
self.start_layer = start_layer or device_pool.start_layer
self.end_layer   = end_layer   or device_pool.end_layer

makes the host shard self‑contained before any loader thread starts.
No other files are t

FIX #16800 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)
[rank0]: AttributeError: '_OpNamespace' '_C' object has no attribute 'init_shm_manager'

This better matches Hugging Face, the main other place top_k is used.
Closes #17553.

vllm.title: [Misc] add dify integration
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Continue to add popular tool integration:
Dify is a widely used open-source platform for developing LLM-based applications.
Based on the interest shown by the community—evident from many discussions
and searches related to "Dify with vLLM"—it's worthwhile to add to doc.

vllm.title: [BugFix][AMD] Compatible patch for latest AITER(05/07/2025)
vllm.author: qli88

vllm.title: [v1] Move block management logic from KVCacheManager to SpecializedManager
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Should be merged after #17398
To prepare for hybrid allocator, this PR moves logic that need to run for each specialized manager from KVCacheManager to SpecializedManager. As the SpecializedManager not only contains customized logic for different attention type, I renamed it to SingleTypeKVCacheMana

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Automatically retry flaky tests
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
To avoid blocking CI on main, this PR automatically retries known flaky tests using pytest.mark.flaky from pytest-rerunfailures plugin.
Also, replace retry_until_skip with pytest.mark.flaky.

{"detail":"Unsupp

vllm.title: Add option to use torch._inductor.standalone_compile
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the option to use torch._inductor.standalone_compile to perform compilation instead of compile_fx. The goal of standalone_compile is to remove the hacks around vLLM's usage of compile_fx, we want to migrate to using it in PyTorch 2.8.
standalone_compile replaces how vLLM interacts with

vllm.title: [V1][Spec Decoding] Include bonus tokens in mean acceptance length
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I'm told the acceptance length metric - as reported by V0, in all our V1 benchmarking to date, in other inference engines, and in relevant papers - includes bonus tokens, so we should add 1 to our current calculation.
See #17010 (comment) for context.
Also updated v1 spec decoding metrics design doc

vllm.title: [Hardware/NVIDIA/Kernel] [Functional Enablement] [1/N] Enable nvidia/DeepSeek-R1-FP4 Model
vllm.author: pavanimajety
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds functionality support for ModelOptFP4FusedMoE method, the required (basic) cutlass fp4 group gemms.
There will be follow-up PRs for performance tuning on Blackwell. We are working on configs for general MoE Models as well as DS-R1.
